description: Change-request acknowledgement when classifier predicts a timeline

values.requestSummary: update phone number on the contact page to 020 1234 5678

expected.subject: Your change request is in the queue
expected.body:
Hi Sam,

Got it: update phone number on the contact page to 020 1234 5678.

I'll work on this and have it live by tomorrow afternoon.

You have 2 change requests left for this month. You can
retract this request from your dashboard any time before I start
working on it.

— Cowork (your ModuForge ops assistant)
